lessons.title: Types of Errors in Node.js
lessons.description: Understand operational vs programmer errors and synchronous vs asynchronous errors.

lessons.title: Handling Synchronous Errors
lessons.description: Use try/catch and proper error propagation.

lessons.title: Handling Asynchronous Errors (Callbacks, Promises, Async/Await)
lessons.description: Catch errors in async code and avoid unhandled rejections.

lessons.title: Debugging Node.js Applications
lessons.description: Use console.log, debugger, and Node's built-in inspector.
